title: Sort options in My Work
excerpt: I’d love to see more flexibility in the My Work section. Like to sort by board or group by status rather than just date. We have several tasks that are assigned to multiple people for example, and I’d love to be able to …

posts.author: Anika (Anika Bachle)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to see more flexibility in the My Work section. Like to sort by board or group by status rather than just date. We have several tasks that are assigned to multiple people for example, and I’d love to be able to sort by tasks that are only assigned to me. It would be great if the My Work section had as many filter options as a regular board does so each person could sort it how they need.
